summary: The diff implements all 7 requirements with good coverage. REQ-1 backend CRUD functions are added to main.mo with stable storage. REQ-2 ToDoList.tsx page is created with all required features. REQ-3 navigation link is added to Header.tsx. REQ-4 AdminLoginGate.tsx implements credential-gated access with sessionStorage. REQ-5 AdminDashboardCredentialGated.tsx includes todo monitoring panel. REQ-6 /admin-dashboard route is added in App.tsx. REQ-7 migration.mo is created. One minor gap: the diff summary for main.mo is truncated, making it difficult to fully verify all CRUD function implementations, but the truncated content and useQueries.ts hooks strongly suggest they are present.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Monitor' nav link to /admin-dashboard is added to the Header component in both desktop and mobile navigation, plus a Monitor Dashboard entry in the user dropdown.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 only requested adding a 'To-Do' or 'Tasks' nav link to /todos. Adding a separate Monitor/Admin Dashboard nav link to /admin-dashboard in the Header was not requested by any requirement.
